svg.title: IoTsmart ESP32-C6 overview
svg.desc: IoTsmart ESP32-C6 — SoM controller based on Espressif ESP32-C6
svg.text: SoM controller · Espressif ESP32-C6 · WiFi 6 + BLE 5 + Zigbee/Thread · plugs directly into IoTextra mezzanine modules
H-HOST or V-HOST connector · EYESPI (LCD) · dual Qwiic I²C · USB Type-C · onboard EEPROM · 47×30 mm
Part of the IoTsmart series · compatible with IoTextra mezzanine modules · Make Things Happy!
